title: Kasba Patāspur Heat Wave
lead: Kasba Patāspur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.09. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Kasba Patāspur has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The city's Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 16.8 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing a significant demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 64% and the wind speed is at 16.2 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect Kasba Patāspur's residents and infrastructure.
